name: Nighthawk Custom
short_description: Nighthawk Custom builds ultimate American-made 1911 and double stack pistols. Each firearm is fully hand built by a single gunsmith using their One Gun, One Gunsmith philosophy.

name: Faxon Firearms
short_description: Faxon Firearms is an ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer specializing in award-winning rifle barrels machined in-house from bar stock, along with AR-15 and AR-10 firearms, suppressors, and the patented ARAK-21 rifle platform.

name: Henry Repeating Arms
short_description: Henry Repeating Arms is one of America's leading firearms manufacturers and the world leader in lever-action rifles, shotguns, and revolvers. Made in America, or not made at all.

name: Diamondback Firearms
short_description: Family-owned American firearms manufacturer on Florida's Space Coast, producing rifles, pistols, handguns, suppressors, and accessories since 2009.

name: Hi-Point Firearms
short_description: American firearms manufacturer producing affordable handguns, carbines, rifles, and suppressors with a lifetime warranty on every firearm.

name: Nourishing Family Farm
short_description: Family-owned raw milk dairy farm offering grass-fed dairy products, pasture-raised meats, and handmade soaps with weekly delivery across north-central Missouri.

name: Red Rose Creative House
short_description: Faith-inspired fine art photography prints, greeting cards, and bookmarks by photographer Anna Hitrova, printed in-house on museum-quality archival paper.

name: Elkhorn Products
short_description: Innovative HVAC/R technology company with patent-pending hydrovaporization cooling systems that cut energy costs 50% and global warming potential by 90%.

name: Hybrid Human
short_description: Organic ceremonial cacao company offering 100% pure ethically traded heirloom cacao from Belize's Maya Mountains, crafted as drinking discs for a natural energy and mood-boosting daily ritual.
